name: Mushroom Steak
recipeInstructions:
1 Trim excess fat from the roast.
2 Combine the dry soup mix and dried onions on a sheet of aluminum foil or wax paper.
3 Roll the roast in the mixture to coat it well.
4 Place the coated roast in a crock pot.
5 Pour the red wine (or water) over the roast.
6 Cover and cook on medium (200°F) for 8 hours, turning the roast after 4 hours if possible.
Alternatively, cook on high (290°F) for 4 hours, turning the roast after 2 hours if possible.
7 Serve with mashed potatoes and buttered green beans.
